fields.label: Slider style
fields.name: slider_type
fields.instructions: How the slider is displayed. More options (e.g. navigation slider, timed slideshow) will be added later.

choices.table_of_contents: Table of contents (list left, image right)

fields.label: Headline
fields.name: headline
fields.instructions: Main headline above the slider (e.g. "Tennessee Tree Day 2026 Species").

fields.label: Body copy
fields.name: body
fields.instructions: Intro text below the headline (e.g. "Tree species this year include:").

fields.label: Gallery
fields.name: gallery
fields.instructions: Add images. Each image's title becomes a clickable list item; clicking shows that image. Order determines list order.
